body.title: GitHub Action: tagged release → PyPI publish for agent_datacenter
body.result: No standalone ADC PyPI release planned — same rationale as T-igor-pypi-tagged-release.
body.description:
Add a GitHub Actions workflow to agent_datacenter repo that publishes to PyPI on every semver tag push. Uses pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish. Requires PyPI API token in repo secrets.

**Affected files:** .github/workflows/publish.yml, pyproject.toml (verify metadata complete)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** publish workflow only
**Test plan:** test against TestPyPI before production publish
